plugins.name: weekly-review
plugins.description: Weekly development review across all git worktrees — merged PRs, active branches, and next-week priorities

plugins.name: prep-report
plugins.description: Convert analysis session artifacts into a structured report — slides, doc, or Anthropic Science blog-style write-up (interactive interview + outline approval gate)

plugins.name: analyze-project
plugins.description: Comprehensive project status analysis — scan docs, code, git history to map achievements, gaps, and priorities

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Sprint planning, session kickoff, status snapshot, and handoff using GitHub Issues as source of truth

plugins.name: paperbanana
plugins.description: Generate publication-quality diagrams and plots from text descriptions — turn ideas into visuals

plugins.name: generate-slides
plugins.description: Generate PPTX slide decks from session artifacts with interactive outline brainstorming and programmatic generation via python-pptx

plugins.name: figure-style
plugins.description: Enforce publication-quality figure styling with automated verification — font sizes, colors, labels, layout, and export settings
